content:
MODULE: cosmos.evolution.federated_population
FILE: cosmos/evolution/federated_population.py (777 lines)
CATEGORY: evolution

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Federated Population Manager - Distributed Evolution

Integrates genetic_optimizer.py with p2p.py for planetary-scale
distributed evolution across Cosmos instances.

AGI Cohesion Features:
- Island model evolution with P2P migration
- Privacy-preserving fitness aggregation
- Federated genome 

CLASSES:
- FederatedEvolutionConfig: Configuration for federated population evolution.
- MigrantGenome: A genome migrating from another node.
- FederatedFitnessReport: Aggregated fitness from the federation.
- FederatedPopulationManager: Manages distributed population evolution across P2P network.

Implements island 
  Methods: def set_node_id(self, node_id: str)
  Methods: def connect_swarm(self, swarm_fabric)
  Methods: def connect_optimizer(self, genetic_optimizer)
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: def receive_migrant(self, genome_data: Dict, fitness_score: float, source_node: str, generation: int
  Methods: def receive_fitness_report(self, genome_hash: str, fitness_scores: Dict[str, float], peer_id: str)
  Methods: def on_migration_received(self, callback: Callable)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def setup_federated_evolution(genetic_optimizer=None, swarm_fabric=None, fitness_tracker=None, nexus=None) -> Fede
